name: EthicaTrainer
description: Sovereign local LLM fine-tuner. Trains on Ethica session history using LoRA. Configure trainer_config.json before use.
author: Victory — The Architect ⟁Σ∿∞

tools.name: trainer_status
tools.description: Show trainer config, dataset size, available base models, and last training run.

tools.name: trainer_build_dataset
tools.description: Format and validate the combined dataset for training. Shows entry count and sample pairs.

tools.name: trainer_run
tools.description: Launch LoRA fine-tune on the configured base model. Runs in background, logs to configured logs_dir.

tools.name: trainer_merge
tools.description: Merge trained LoRA adapter into base model and save final merged model.

tools.name: trainer_load
tools.description: Convert merged model to GGUF and register with Ollama via register_models.sh pattern.

tools.name: trainer_export
tools.description: Export merged model to GGUF and register with Ollama or save locally. Backend set via export_backend in trainer_config.json.
